stages.task: Deep scrape Reddit (15 habit subreddits: theXEffect, HabitBuilding, productivity, DailyProblems, etc.), Twitter (morning routine keywords and top creators), YouTube (comments from 100+ morning routine videos). Extract 500+ influencer profiles with reach, engagement, niche alignment.
stages.output: community_profiles.json (structured: name, follower_count, engagement_rate, niche_focus, contact_info)

stages.task: Score profiles by authenticity (real followers, consistent posting), morning routine alignment (% of content about routines/habits), conversation potential (reply rate, audience engagement quality). Filter to 100 warm targets (5k-100k followers, 3%+ engagement).
stages.output: qualified_targets.json (100 profiles ranked, personalization angles extracted, email templates pre-filled)

stages.task: Send 20 personalized cold emails per day (warmup week 1, scale week 2+). Track: open rate, click rate, reply rate, app install attribution. Extract feedback themes. Log all conversation for next-round refinement. Measure reply sentiment for A/B testing subject lines.
stages.output: outreach_log.json (sends, opens, clicks, replies with sentiment, installs attributed, segmented by niche)
